case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. ABDEL H SDAIGUI et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT SDAIGUI, ABDEL H
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-14-2009 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-14-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
